title:
OTN TOKEN PRICE
REACHES $7.36*
AND KEEPS RISING
subtitle: That’s a +174.01% growth in the last 24 hours!
text-1: The price of OTN tokens is really taking off as both mining and trading intensifies. Starting this week, we’ll be cutting back on token emissions, which means
text-1-strong: the price of OTNs will be getting even higher.
text-1-2: That’s one more reason to hold on to the ones you got and mine some more.
forum-title: OTN at the Blockchain Economic Forum 2017
forum-text: OTN is due to present at the Blockchain Economic Forum in New York! We’ll be giving a speech about our revolutionary technological approach, our goals and the upcoming products.
